title: Junior Data Scientist
description: We are seeking a Junior Data Scientist with experience in Python, SQL, data analysis, and basic machine learning. The candidate should be comfortable working with datasets, building models, and communicating insights to stakeholders.

title: Data Analyst
description: The Data Analyst will work with SQL databases, create dashboards, and perform exploratory data analysis. Strong skills in Python and data visualization tools are required.

title: Backend Developer
description: Looking for a backend developer with Node.js, REST APIs, and cloud infrastructure experience. Python is a plus but not required.
